2026-03-06PMOCanada Elections ActBy-Election - University—RosedaleOrder directing that a WRIT OF ELECTION do issue in order to fill the vacancy in the House of Commons for the electoral district of University—Rosedale, in Ontario, with polling to take place on April 13, 2026.N/A
subject: By-Election - University—Rosedale
precis: Order directing that a WRIT OF ELECTION do issue in order to fill the vacancy in the House of Commons for the electoral district of University—Rosedale, in Ontario, with polling to take place on April 13, 2026.
